CREATE TABLE sample_data (id INT, value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO sample_data (id, value) VALUES (4, NULL);
SELECT VAR_SAMP(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM sample_data WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3));
CREATE TABLE another_data (group_id INT, value FLOAT);
SELECT group_id, VAR_SAMP(value) FROM another_data GROUP BY group_id;
SELECT VAR_SAMP(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM sample_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT value FROM another_data WHERE group_id = 1);
SELECT VAR_SAMP(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM sample_data WHERE value > 0);
CREATE TABLE test_data (category VARCHAR(50), score FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_data (category, score) VALUES ('A', 3.0), ('A', 5.0), ('B', 7.0), ('B', 9.0), ('C', NULL);
SELECT category, VAR_SAMP(score) FROM test_data GROUP BY category;
SELECT VAR_SAMP(value) FROM sample_data WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM another_data);
